title: capsicum frutescens var. glabriusculum
intro: Capsicum frutescens var. glabriusculum is a variety of the chili pepper plant, known for its small, compact size and intense heat. It is a type of hot pepper that is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a natural analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Capsicum frutescens var. glabriusculum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from arthritis to wounds.
